summary: Iter 74 bottom-nav-bar 3-button fix verified via Playwright web preview (frontend-only, no backend touched). Logged in as admin (admin@referme.app / Admin@12345), rendered admin (tabs) layout at two viewports: 375x667 and 393x830 (Pixel-6-3-button). In both cases the tab bar is anchored to the very bottom of the viewport (tablist bbox.y + bbox.height == innerHeight), all 6 admin tabs (Dashboard/Users/Jobs/Interviews/Credits/Approvals) are visible, labeled, and clickable; navigation to /admin/users and /admin/jobs works. Active vs inactive icon coloring confirmed via aria-selected on tab and per-route color mapping in TAB_ICON_MAP. Student layout not re-verified in a fresh login (direct signup via api returned 403 from the CDN when hit from Playwright's outbound; not a regression), but layout code is structurally identical to admin (same useSafeAreaInsets + Math.max(insets.bottom,8) pattern) so the fix applies uniformly. No red-screen / no console errors related to the nav bar. Bug appears fixed.

viewport_375x667_admin.note: On web, insets.bottom == 0 so effective bottomPad = max(0,8) = 8. React-Navigation-web renders tab bar at 53px (its own web height baseline). The 60+bottomPad height and paddingBottom are applied natively on Android where the fix actually takes effect.

icon_coloring.active_tab_aria_selected_true: Jobs (after click) -> aria-selected='true'; other tabs aria-selected='false'
icon_coloring.inactive_color_in_code: #94A3B8 (slate-400) via TAB_INACTIVE; active colors from TAB_ICON_MAP.activeColor per route (coral/blue/violet/amber/emerald).

observations: All three role layouts consistently call useSafeAreaInsets() and use bottomPad = Math.max(insets.bottom, 8).
tabBarStyle.height = 60 + bottomPad and paddingBottom = bottomPad — exactly what the fix description says.

SafeAreaProvider must be higher in the tree for useSafeAreaInsets() to return non-zero on Android; if a wrapping SafeAreaProvider is not mounted in app/_layout.tsx, insets.bottom will be 0 and the min-fallback of 8 keeps the bar visible. Recommend verifying SafeAreaProvider is present in root layout.

action_items: (Optional) Confirm <SafeAreaProvider> wraps the root Stack in app/_layout.tsx so useSafeAreaInsets() returns a real insets.bottom on Android 3-button devices; otherwise the code falls back to 8 px which is still safe.
(Optional) On a real Android 3-button device or emulator, physically confirm the tab labels/icons are not clipped by the system nav bar — cannot be done on web preview.
critical_code_review_comments: shadow* style deprecation console warnings observed (pre-existing, unrelated to this fix).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 74 nav-bar fix verified on admin (tabs) at two viewports. Student (tabs) and Professional (tabs) share identical code pattern and were not separately re-logged-in this run. If a full 3-role re-verification is required, use admin creds (admin@referme.app/Admin@12345), demo employer (demo-employer@referme.app/Demo@12345) for pro, and create a student via UI signup flow (backend returns mock_otp).
rca_of_issue: Bug: on Android devices with 3-button system nav, edge-to-edge draws content under the nav bar causing bottom Tabs to be partially occluded. Fix: read useSafeAreaInsets().bottom and add it to both tabBarStyle.height (60 + insets) and paddingBottom, with an 8-px minimum fallback. Applied uniformly to all three role tab layouts. Verified in web preview that the tab bar is bottom-flush, all tabs are rendered/clickable and navigation works. Actual Android native inset consumption cannot be validated in a Playwright web preview but the code path is correct.
